landing.features.subtitle.message: Find out what makes us one of the best bots for protecting your Discord server from malicious users.

landing.features.anti-spam.description.message: Sanction spam attempts instantly, without any intervention on your part.

landing.features.raid.description.message: Worried about a raid? Our bot is capable of detecting and blocking it before it even impacts your server.

landing.features.captcha.description.message: With captcha, your members have to prove they're human. Say goodbye to automated accounts.

landing.features.mod.description.message: Manage your server like a pro with our various moderation and administration features.

landing.features.tag.description.message: Tag Role automatically assigns a role to members who add your server's tag.

landing.features.dm.description.message: An unprecedented shield against spam, scam and private message scams.
